reasoning: Both audits failed during source download phase (makepkg --nobuild), preventing examination of critical files like source code and build scripts. While PKGBUILD audits showed no red flags, full safety assessment requires source inspection.
coverage_issues: Source code not reviewed due to download failure
false_negatives: Unverified risks in source code (e.g., malicious build scripts)
Undetected post-install hooks in source tree
Potential unsafe patching in prepare() function
re_audit_focus: Source tarball contents (especially build system scripts)
learnings: Improve download reliability: implement retries/mirror fallbacks
Prioritize source code review even if build fails
Add warning when critical files (build scripts) remain unaudited
Detect trusted source domains earlier to bypass failed downloads
